title: String Reversal
description: Reverse a string manually without using library functions.
problemStatement:
Strings in C are arrays of characters ending with a null terminator `\0`. Reverse the string `"Progly"` in place.

**Requirement:** Do not use `strrev()`. Swap characters from both ends until you reach the middle.

**Expected Output:** `ylgorP`.
hints: First, find the length of the string.
Use a loop that runs for half the length and swaps `str[i]` with `str[len-1-i]`.
